commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Google Chat reply delivery to trim current thread targets, clear stale threaded typing placeholders when replyToMode removes the target, and prevent durable final replies from inheriting stale thread metadata.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +80. Total +105 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection and focused tests show how stale Google Chat reply targets can survive into later text, media, and durable final delivery; I did not run a live Chat reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is currently identified; the remaining action is a maintainer choice between live Google Chat proof, proof waiver, or consolidation with the broader overlapping PR.

target.title: fix(googlechat): preserve thread targets through reply delivery
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair Google Chat reply delivery so text chunks, media sends, typing-message fallback, and durable final delivery use the intended current thread target without leaking stale reply metadata.
- Keep `replyToMode` semantics intact for implicit vs explicit reply targets.
- Carry forward the useful prior work from #74235 and the earlier #43112/#67055 thread-routing attempts.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/googlechat/src/monitor.reply-delivery.test.ts extensions/googlechat/src/monitor-durable.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Refs: #42510, #69422, #70041, #74235.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-4952-google-chat-dm-threading-broken-each-response-creates-new-thread
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/74235, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67055, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/43112, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/30965
- Credit: Preserve source PR attribution for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/74235 after live hydration identifies its author and branch writability.; Credit @banddude for the prior replyToMode/off-mode attempt in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/67055 when release-note context mentions provenance.; Credit @neeravmakwana for the earlier replyToMode/thread-routing attempt in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/43112 when release-note context mentions provenance.; Credit @novan for the landed Google Chat messageReplyOption groundwork in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/30965 if the final PR body discusses the regression history.
- Validation: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/googlechat/src/monitor.reply-delivery.test.ts extensions/googlechat/src/monitor-durable.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.

Inherited issue-closing references from the source PR:
Fixes #52475
Closes #42510

Co-author credit kept:
- @jai: Co-authored-by: Jai Govindani <1943284+jai@users.noreply.github.com>
- @banddude: Co-authored-by: banddude <127166397+banddude@users.noreply.github.com>
- @neeravmakwana: Co-authored-by: Neerav Makwana <261249544+neeravmakwana@users.noreply.github.com>
- @novan: Co-authored-by: Novan Adrian <316959+novan@users.noreply.github.com>
